item.title: The failures of prediction markets are predictable
item.description: They can send wrong signals when trading is illiquid or when herd behaviour takes hold

item.title: UK stocks are handling 2026 much better than the UK economy
item.description: The UK relies on energy imports, which are surging in price, but many FTSE 100 companies have benefited from the volatility

item.description: While there is a lot of spare crude on ships and in storage, stocks of refined products are much smaller

item.description: Prime minister says country’s natural gas imports bill has tripled since start of Iran war

item.description: Eco-friendly formulas, beauty industry-standard testing and subscription services are enticing converts to a new era of premium ‘clean’ products

item.description: Leonard will remain an advisor, with a focus on supporting a new investment strategy, company says

item.description: Rebate gives High Art Capital a financial incentive to make bulk purchases of unsold condos to add them to the rental market

item.description: Litigation funder’s share price fell 54% following decision by New York judges

item.description: Big Four firm and rivals are struggling to regain footing even after reductions in headcount and costs

item.description: Incidents revealed a range of personal information, but not billing data, telecoms say

item.description: Melanie Redman and Stephen Gaetz are working to expand programs that improve the lives of marginalized young people

item.description: Decline reported by University of Michigan survey occurred across political party affiliation and age groups

item.description: New research suggests AI data centres will need much less memory than investors had bargained for

item.description: Commercial inventories could be used up by mid-May if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed
